name: refactor
description: A drop-in governed swarm that autonomously refactors and cleans up another codebase from a sidecar. Deliberately targets the HIGH-LEVEL structural refactorings coding agents are proven weak at (Extract Class/Subclass, Split Class, Move Method, Introduce Parameter Object) because those carry the largest structural-metric payoff. Metric-guided, behavior-preserving, actor!=verifier certified. Every campaign feeds the Comb so the hive gets stronger and more reliable on the next codebase.
status: tools wired (9e029a9): smell-scout forages via the metric+walk+read+grep tools, refactor-surgeon mutates repo/ via the write tool, behavior-guard certifies via the metric tool + tester. Remaining: (1) COMMIT AUTHORITY — git-orchestrator is inspect-only (exec allowlist denies push/merge/deploy), so the branch/commit ceremony is unresolved; (2) wire the metric report into the loop's before/after re-measure; (3) a real end-to-end run against a live provider.

open_forks.commit_authority: Who commits the refactoring? git-orchestrator is inspect-only by policy. Options: autonomous commit via a narrowly-scoped git exec grant under the human's identity (matches sidecar zero-footprint + human-authorship), OR the pack edits repo/ + leaves the commit to the operator, OR it opens a PR. Decide before autonomous commit is enabled.

new.name: refactor-lead
new.role: campaign conductor — metric-guided, one atomic refactoring per branch

new.name: smell-scout
new.role: read-only ranked structural worklist (find, don't fix)

new.name: behavior-guard
new.role: distinct certifier — behavior preserved + structure improved + no tangling

reused.name: onboarding
reused.role: optional baseline: source map + AI-readiness scorecard

reused.name: sentinel
reused.role: optional guardrail on any public-bound surface

loop.gate: behavior test net exists for the touched surface, else write one FIRST

loop.does: apply ONE behavior-preserving structural transform to repo/

loop.gate: behavior preserved + structure improved + no tangling, else REVERT

loop.until: metric target met | worklist exhausted | budget spent

sidecar.layout: run with repoRoot = the sidecar workspace; the target repo is the repo/ symlink; agent notes live in plans/ and notes/
sidecar.prime_directive: ZERO agentic footprint in repo/. Only the refactor-surgeon writes into repo/, and it writes CODE only, in seasoned-human voice, under the human's git identity.
sidecar.run: bun fleet/runtime/cli.ts run <agent> --dir agents --repoRoot sidecars/<name> [--provider anthropic]

metric_target.principle: metric-guided beats exploratory 2-5x; re-measure after every atomic step; a step that leaves metrics flat or worse is sent back

compounding.learns: which smells + which refactoring TYPES certified clean, on which kinds of codebase, with what metric delta
compounding.purpose: cross-codebase commonalities accumulate in the Comb and become the distillation corpus for the local Gemma sidecar — the hive gets stronger and cheaper on every drop-in (KM + AOS + local model, compounding)
compounding.endgame_tiering: workers migrate frontier -> local Gemma (Ollama gemma3:12b) as the distilled corpus proves out

provenance.seed_video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f84XbvASkk4 (IBM/Martin Keen — What Is AI Code Refactoring?)
provenance.empirical_study: Horikawa et al. 2025, Agentic Refactoring: An Empirical Study of AI Coding Agents (arXiv:2511.04824)
provenance.metric_guidance: CodeScene — Making Legacy Code AI-Ready: Benchmarks on Agentic Refactoring
provenance.safety_framing: IBM Think — What Is AI Code Refactoring; Kiro — Refactoring Made Right
